title: LaVell Edwards Stadium exterior
caption: First look at LaVell Edwards Stadium, home of BYU football, with the Wasatch Mountains rising behind the stadium.
alt: Exterior view of LaVell Edwards Stadium with BYU branding and mountains in the background.

title: BYU seating bowl
caption: Inside the stadium looking across the BYU seating bowl, with the mountain backdrop giving it one of the best settings in college football.
alt: Interior view of LaVell Edwards Stadium showing BYU seating and mountains beyond the stands.

title: Field view from the stands
caption: A wide view from inside LaVell Edwards Stadium, taking in the field, stands and scoreboard on a clear Utah afternoon.
alt: Wide interior view of LaVell Edwards Stadium from the stands looking across the field.

title: Mountain backdrop at BYU
caption: The empty stands and mountain backdrop at LaVell Edwards Stadium — a proper bucket-list college football setting.
alt: View of the seating at LaVell Edwards Stadium with mountains visible beyond the stadium.
